transcript: 小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安小安感谢观看妈妈妈妈小安这是什么好漂亮谢谢小安你要了吗嗯 safe inside my mind so anywhere i find i that you'll catch me if I fall. You give me everything. You see the best in me. No matter where you goYou'll come back home Still only learning To say what's in my heart So when you're hurting, I don't know where to start And though the words are often hard to find We still have time to make things right Yeah, I'm going Friday You give me everything You see the best in me No matter where I go, I'll come back home. Okay. 4.30 on Thursday. Okay. See you then. Hey, Ma. Mmm, smells good in here. Ma? Ma? Ma? Mom! Are you okay? Mom, what's wrong? Mom! Is that enough, Mom? So when you're hurting, I don't know where to start
And though the words are often hard to find
We still have time to make things right Yeah, I'm going Friday You give me everything You see the best in me No matter where I go, I'll come back home.
